name: vike-ai
description: The AI PORT: generate() / chat() / stream() + a swappable provider contract/registry (an echo provider in dev, Rudder AI / Vercel AI SDK / a direct Anthropic provider in prod). Framework-agnostic, provider-neutral, server-only, the AI twin of @universal-orm/core: app code depends on this port; the app registers the concrete provider. Multi-vendor (claude/gemini/openai) lives inside the provider via a per-call model/provider selector, not in this seam.
